title: 私の知らない、私の役割

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of our summer camp. To make the most of our
time, we make a beeline for the beach.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Huff, puff... Big Brother, how was my time?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Huff, puff... Big Sister, how was my time?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't reached our goal yet, right? Ugh, I'm so sorry. It's
because I'm no good...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Still, I know what I need to work on. S-so... I just need to work on it
until I get it perfect.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll work on things one step at a time, improve myself little by
little...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll do whatever it takes... to get faster!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Here I go, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Here I go, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice runs off without showing even a hint of fatigue. As I watch over
her progress, a small figure approaches.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Amazing. She just keeps on trucking.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah! S-sorry. Forget that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The mysterious girl disappears as quickly as she had arrived...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Whew!
choice_data_list: Nice going, Rice—that was a new record!
Nice going, Rice—that was a new record!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh... R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I did it... I really did it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It took a ton of time... but I'm happy I did it.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You're really something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, the girl from earlier is standing next to Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Rice, was it? You're incredible... I can't believe you can just keep
going like that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Incredible? Wait... you mean me? N-not at all! Th-that's not true!

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yes it is! You never gave up on running... Meanwhile, I want to give
up as soon as anything goes wrong...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I've thought about giving up before too! More times... than I can
count.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I can barely do anything right... I hate seeing myself be so useless. I
can't tell you how many times I almost gave up out of frustration.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Really? Then... what makes you keep going?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's just...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've figured out... the me I want to be.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: "The me I want to be?"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. I want to enter a bunch of races, win a lot, and make everyone
happy. That's the me... I want to be.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And when I think about that dream, I can't stop myself. I can't give up—I have to run—no, I want to keep running!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I'm sorry for not giving you a good answer! I-I'm not the best at
talking—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait... Eep?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Out of nowhere, a giant wave crashes down, completely drenching us.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough... Ah, I'm so sorry! I mixed you up in my misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! Hehe. Hehe, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Why are you laughing?

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Haha... My bad. Not sure if it was the wave just now, but my head
feels a lot clearer now.

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Rice. You helped me remember something important.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Wha?

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to be faster, to be stronger... I almost forgot what that felt
like. I can't give up when I haven't achieved my goals yet, now can I?

text_block_list.name: Short Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm going for a run! Rice, next time we meet, it'll be at a
race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-how come? It was my fault she got soaked. But then she... thanked
me? Why?
choice_data_list: You gave her the courage to move forward.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... did? I... W-wa—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: —waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: By the time I finish comforting Rice, it's dark outside.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm sorry for crying. I was just... so happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's the first time, you know. The first time I've cheered someone up...
instead of bringing them misfortune.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mhm! If that's the case... then I'm happy too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: For as long as I can remember, I've always hated myself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But after today... Maybe I can learn to like myself. Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice smiles from ear to ear, her eyes sparkling brighter than the starry
night sky.
